title: LiTlight G9 LED Bulbs Cool White 5W 600LM, 6000 Kelvin G9 Light Bulb, Equivalent to 50W Halogen, Non-Dimmable Energy Saving Lamps for Home Lighting Décor, No Flicker, 6 Packs
features: Energy Efficiency Class C g9 led bulbs: Replace old 30w, 40w, 50w G9 halogen bulbs with our efficient AC 230V 5W led g9 bulbs, providing the 600lm bright light with low power consumption, saving over 90% on electricity bill.

6000K Cool White Light: Emitting 600 lumens of crisp cool white 6000K light with a 360° beam angle, G9 LED bulbs provide instant-on, even, and flicker-free illumination without buzzing, creating a bright and refreshing atmosphere ideal for modern spaces.

Long Lifespan: Using high-quality C class LED chips prevent visual flickering or glare, no flicker no buzzing. Our G9 Led light bulbs can last up to 15000 hours of work life, reducing the hassle of frequent bulb replacements.

Compact size 15.6mm × 50.5mm: with a standard G9 base, making gu9 led easy to install. With a Color Rendering Index (CRI) of 80, colors appear vibrant and true-to-life, reducing eye strain and enhancing visual comfort. These are Non-dimmable bulbs and are not compatible with dimmer switches.

Wide Application: G9 bulbs are ideal for a variety of lighting fixtures including chandeliers, crystal chandeliers, ceiling fan lights, wall sconces, desk lamps, and more — perfect for living rooms, dining rooms, offices, and restaurant, etc.
